title: Fix tool arg safety

tasks.title: Codify tool argument safety and origin linkage spec law
tasks.verification: JSON parse check passed for .adv/specs/advance-workflow/spec.json and .adv/specs/backlog-coordination/spec.json via adv_run_test (exit 0).
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated .adv/specs/advance-workflow/spec.json with structural blank artifact/linkage argument requirements covering adv_change_update, adv_change_create, storage-boundary blank write rejection, offending-field errors, and omission semantics. Updated .adv/specs/backlog-coordination/spec.json with origin linkage matrix and creation-time Temporal seed-state requirements for roadmap/triage/discovery/adhoc/omitted origins and AdvBacklogIssueNumber search attributes.
tasks.notes: Completed spec law updates. Added rq-toolArgBlankArtifactLinkage01 to advance-workflow and rq-backlogCoord08 to backlog-coordination; bumped spec versions/dates. Verified both JSON specs parse successfully.

tasks.title: Reject blank artifact updates at preflight, execute, and storage layers
tasks.verification: RED: added failing mixed-blank preflight, tool execute, and storage no-partial-write tests; initial targeted run failed on those assertions. GREEN: pnpm exec vitest run src/utils/tool-arg-preflight.test.ts src/tools/change.test.ts src/storage/json.test.ts passed (3 files, 121 tests).
tasks.implementation_summary: Added preflight rejection for every provided blank adv_change_update artifact field, including mixed valid+blank payloads. Added tool execute-layer blank artifact guard before change lookup/storage writes. Added storage-boundary no-partial-write guard in updateChangeArtifacts. Added regression tests for preflight, direct tool execution, omitted-field compatibility, and storage partial-write prevention.
tasks.notes: Completed layered blank artifact update rejection. Verified red/green targeted tests.

error_recovery.last_error: Initial targeted RED run failed as expected on newly added mixed-blank/preflight, tool execute, and storage no-partial-write assertions before implementation.

attempts.error: New tests failed before implementation: mixedBlank.ok was true; updateChangeArtifacts returned undefined error and partially wrote; adv_change_update attempted storage write for blank design.
attempts.diagnosis: Existing guards only required at least one non-empty artifact field and did not reject other provided blanks; storage wrote provided empty/blank content.
attempts.fix_tried: Implemented explicit blank-field detection in preflight, adv_change_update execute path, and updateChangeArtifacts before writes.

tasks.title: Reject blank create artifacts and enforce origin linkage matrix
tasks.verification: RED: added failing create blank artifact/source and origin matrix tests; initial targeted run failed 5 tests. GREEN: pnpm exec vitest run src/utils/tool-arg-preflight.test.ts src/tools/change-origin.test.ts src/tools/change-claim.test.ts src/storage/json.test.ts passed (4 files, 99 tests).
tasks.implementation_summary: Added adv_change_create preflight and execute-layer validation for blank provided narrative artifact fields and blank origin_source_artifact. Enforced origin matrix: roadmap requires issue and rejects source artifact; triage accepts optional issue/source; discovery rejects issue and accepts source; adhoc/omitted origin reject linkage fields. Updated origin tests and claim compatibility tests remained green.
tasks.notes: Completed create-time blank artifact/source rejection and origin linkage matrix enforcement. Verified red/green targeted tests.

error_recovery.last_error: Initial targeted RED run failed as expected on new adv_change_create preflight and origin matrix assertions.

attempts.error: New tests failed: adv_change_create accepted blank design/source, roadmap source_artifact, discovery issue_number, and adhoc linkage; adv_change_create preflight returned ok for blank artifacts.
attempts.diagnosis: Existing create path only required roadmap issue and otherwise accepted/persisted linkage fields loosely; optional strings used plain z.string().optional().
attempts.fix_tried: Added structural preflight validator and execute-layer create-origin/blank-field guards before claim checks and workflow creation.

tasks.title: Seed creation metadata into authoritative Temporal workflow state
tasks.verification: RED: added failing create seed metadata tests for tool/store-disk/store-temporal. GREEN: pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/change.test.ts src/storage/store-disk.judgment-calls-removal.test.ts src/storage/store-temporal/changes.test.ts src/temporal/workflow-start.test.ts src/temporal/search-attributes.test.ts src/tools/change-origin.test.ts src/tools/change-claim.test.ts passed (7 files, 88 tests).
tasks.implementation_summary: Extended Store.changes.create with optional initialMetadata. Disk store stamps origin/fast_follow_of/scope_repos into the Change before save. Temporal store passes create options through, starts workflow from the stamped change, and overlays origin/scope metadata. adv_change_create builds initialMetadata for origin/fast-follow/scope and no longer late-saves origin after workflow start. Updated ChangeOrigin comments to match roadmap/triage/discovery/adhoc matrix.
tasks.notes: Completed creation metadata seed path. Valid origin metadata is now passed into store creation, stamped before save, and present in Temporal seed state/search attributes. Removed origin late-save path from adv_change_create.

error_recovery.last_error: Initial RED run failed on create seed metadata tests: disk create ignored initial metadata; adv_change_create called create without options and relied on late save; temporal create did not pass initial metadata through.

attempts.error: New seed metadata tests failed across tool, disk store, and temporal store.
attempts.diagnosis: Origin was attached after store.changes.create, so workflow start saw created.data.origin undefined. Store create had no initial metadata parameter.
attempts.fix_tried: Added ChangeCreateOptions/initialMetadata, stamped disk changes before save, passed options through temporal create, and used create options from adv_change_create.

tasks.title: Run contract-wide regression and compatibility verification
tasks.verification: Targeted regression: pnpm exec vitest run src/utils/tool-arg-preflight.test.ts src/tools/change-origin.test.ts src/tools/change.test.ts src/storage/json.test.ts src/storage/store-disk.judgment-calls-removal.test.ts src/storage/store-temporal/changes.test.ts src/temporal/workflow-start.test.ts src/temporal/search-attributes.test.ts src/tools/change-claim.test.ts passed (9 files, 168 tests). Quality gate: pnpm run check passed. Full suite: pnpm test passed. ADV validation: adv_change_validate strict passed with warning NO_DELTAS only.
tasks.implementation_summary: Ran targeted regression for tool preflight, change create/update, storage artifact writes, origin matrix, claim compatibility, Temporal seed state, and search attributes. Fixed check failures by removing invalid scope_repos from workflow seedState and running Prettier on modified files. Confirmed pnpm run check, pnpm test, and adv_change_validate strict all pass.
tasks.notes: Completed contract-wide regression and compatibility verification. Targeted regression, check, full suite, and ADV validation passed; only validation warning is NO_DELTAS.

error_recovery.last_error: pnpm run check initially failed: first on TypeScript because scope_repos is not a ChangeWorkflowState seedState field, then on Prettier formatting for modified files.

attempts.error: Typecheck failed: scope_repos does not exist in ChangeWorkflowState seedState Pick.
attempts.diagnosis: scope_repos is disk Change metadata, not workflow state; only scope_worktrees is modeled in ChangeWorkflowState.
attempts.fix_tried: Removed scope_repos from Temporal workflow seedState while retaining disk create metadata and overlay projection.

attempts.error: format:check failed on change-origin.test.ts, change.ts, tool-arg-preflight.test.ts, and tool-arg-preflight.ts.
attempts.diagnosis: New long literals and helper blocks needed Prettier normalization.
attempts.fix_tried: Ran pnpm exec prettier --write on the reported files.

wisdom.content: For auto-managed worktree changes, target-path task reads can show the authoritative task graph while main-checkout adv_change_validate may report stale NO_TASKS/CONTRACT_AC_UNCOVERED. Resume/apply from the change worktree target_path for state-sensitive operations.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved proposal with reply: continue. Problem statement and proposal persisted; scope includes blank optional arg guard, origin validation, and Temporal-authoritative origin persistence.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery complete. User approved acceptance criteria/agreement with reply: approve. Agreement persisted; contract minted with 19 items. Decisions: origin_issue_number roadmap/triage only; blank strictness artifact/linkage fields; broader all-tool blank policy deferred to agenda ag-IvWj2x1e; repair path deferred to design.

design.approval_evidence: Design recorded and independently validated. Validator verdict: VALIDATED. No user-value tradeoff, no unresolved conflict, no contract-compromise risk. Key design: layered blank validation, origin matrix, creation-time initialMetadata seed, no dedicated repair tool in this change.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep plan with reply: approve. Plan includes 5 tasks covering spec law, artifact update guards, create/origin guards, Temporal metadata seeding, and contract-wide verification. Proceeding inline to implementation.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution complete. All 5 tasks done with checkpoint commits. Verification: targeted regression passed (9 files, 168 tests), pnpm run check passed, pnpm test passed, adv_change_validate strict passed with warning NO_DELTAS only. Worktree clean.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered work with reply: accept. Review verdict APPROVED after remediation. Contract matrix persisted with 19/19 required rows passed/respected. Verification: targeted remediation tests passed (86), pnpm run check passed, pnpm test passed (226 files, 2920 tests), adv_change_validate strict passed with NO_DELTAS warning only. Executive summary persisted.

items.text: `adv_change_update` rejects any provided blank artifact field, including mixed calls like `{ proposal: "real", design: "" }`, before writes/signals.
`adv_change_create` rejects blank provided narrative artifact fields; omitted fields keep existing default/skip behavior.
`origin_issue_number` is accepted only for `roadmap`/`triage`; `roadmap` still requires it.
Valid creation-time origin metadata appears in authoritative Temporal workflow reads and relevant search attributes.
Error responses name offending fields and tell agents to omit fields they do not intend to change.
Existing valid create/update/proposal flows remain compatible.
Correctness must be structural: Zod schemas, preflight validation, storage-boundary guards, Temporal seed-state flow, and tests.
Scope for blank optional string rejection is artifact/linkage fields only in this change.
Broader all-ADV-tool blank optional string policy is deferred to agenda `ag-IvWj2x1e`.
Runtime source changes require build/deploy/restart before live ADV tool behavior can be validated end-to-end in OpenCode.
Do not silently coerce blank strings to omission for destructive fields.
Do not rely on agent prompt discipline as the safety mechanism.
Do not hand-edit ADV state projections to repair individual changes.
Do not broaden into upstream OpenCode schema conversion fixes.
Do not redesign every ADV tool schema.
Do not add a dedicated origin repair tool unless design proves forward-path seeding is insufficient.

rows.evidence: Targeted regression and full suite passed after remediation. Evidence: plugin/src/utils/tool-arg-preflight.test.ts mixed blank update preflight; plugin/src/tools/change.test.ts mixed blank execute; plugin/src/storage/json.test.ts blank update no partial write. pnpm test: 226 files, 2920 tests passed.
rows.notes: Review found no remaining update blank-field blocker.

rows.evidence: plugin/src/tools/change.test.ts verifies omitted update fields are passed as undefined; plugin/src/storage/json.test.ts verifies omitted update fields leave existing files unchanged. pnpm test passed.

plugin/src/tools/change-origin.test.ts and plugin/src/utils/tool-arg-preflight.test.ts reject blank create narratives; review remediation added plugin/src/storage/json.test.ts scaffold blank guard. pnpm exec vitest run src/storage/json.test.ts src/storage/store-temporal/changes.test.ts passed (86 tests); pnpm test passed.
rows.notes: Create path now has tool and storage-boundary defense.

rows.evidence: plugin/src/tools/change-origin.test.ts covers roadmap requires issue, roadmap rejects source artifact, discovery/adhoc reject issue as specified, triage remains allowed. pnpm test passed.
rows.notes: Origin matrix enforced before claim/workflow creation.

rows.evidence: plugin/src/tools/change-origin.test.ts and plugin/src/utils/tool-arg-preflight.test.ts verify blank origin_source_artifact rejection with fields/hint. pnpm test passed.
rows.notes: Blank linkage field rejected when provided.

rows.evidence: plugin/src/storage/store-temporal/changes.test.ts verifies origin seedState at workflow start and executiveSummary artifact metadata signaling after remediation; plugin/src/temporal/search-attributes.test.ts verifies AdvBacklogIssueNumber from origin. pnpm test passed.
rows.notes: Temporal authoritative origin flow and metadata freshness verified.

rows.evidence: plugin/src/tools/change.test.ts and change-origin.test.ts assert error responses include offending fields and omit guidance; preflight formatter uses same message. pnpm test passed.

Valid create/update/proposal compatibility covered by change-origin.test.ts, change.test.ts, tool-arg-preflight.test.ts, and full suite. pnpm run check passed; pnpm test passed; adv_change_validate strict passed with NO_DELTAS warning only.

Review confirmed structural layers: Zod schemas, preflight validators, tool execute guards, storage guards in json.ts create/update, Temporal seedState in store-temporal/changes.ts, and tests. Remediation closed storage-create and executiveSummary metadata gaps.
rows.notes: Heuristics are not authority for correctness.

rows.evidence: Validation scope is limited to narrative artifact fields and origin linkage fields in adv_change_create/update; no broad all-tool blank optional string policy was introduced.
rows.notes: No scope broadening into unrelated tool schemas.

rows.evidence: No implementation of broader all-ADV-tool blank optional string policy. Existing agenda deferral remains untouched.
Source-level tests and checks passed in this session. Live OpenCode tool behavior still requires plugin build/deploy/session restart per repo gotcha; acceptance summary will call this out as caveat.
Cross-repo review found all touched files under current repo paths (.adv/specs, plugin/src, CHANGELOG.md); no target_repo/target_path tasks or external repo mutations.
Blank provided destructive fields are rejected with explicit errors at preflight/tool/storage layers; no code path silently converts blanks to omitted values.
Structural validation and tests enforce behavior independent of agent prompt discipline.
rows.notes: Prompt guidance is not the safety mechanism.

rows.evidence: No hand edits to ADV state projections; state changes flow through store/Temporal APIs and typed review matrix tooling.
No OpenCode SDK/schema conversion redesign. Existing tool-registry cast pattern remains; new validation is ADV-local.
Only adv_change_create/update and related storage/Temporal artifact metadata paths were changed; no redesign of every ADV tool schema.
No dedicated origin repair tool was added. Origin correctness is handled by forward-path create-time validation and Temporal seed-state persistence.

acceptanceCriteria: `adv_change_update` rejects any provided blank artifact field, including mixed calls like `{ proposal: "real", design: "" }`, before writes/signals.
`adv_change_create` rejects blank provided narrative artifact fields; omitted fields keep existing default/skip behavior.
`origin_issue_number` is accepted only for `roadmap`/`triage`; `roadmap` still requires it.
Valid creation-time origin metadata appears in authoritative Temporal workflow reads and relevant search attributes.
Error responses name offending fields and tell agents to omit fields they do not intend to change.
Existing valid create/update/proposal flows remain compatible.
